title: The Fallen Star
description: A brilliant streak of light tears across the night sky before crashing beyond the nearby hills. By the time you arrive, a glowing stone rests in the center of a smoking crater, warm enough to melt the earth beneath it.

options.title: Take the Star
options.description: The glowing stone could be worth a fortune—or possess unimaginable power.

options.title: Study It
options.description: Instead of disturbing it, you carefully observe the strange object and record what you discover.

options.title: Leave It Alone
options.description: Some things fall from the heavens for reasons beyond mortal understanding.
